hooks.prompt:
Extract and return as additionalContext a 3-level SCQA pyramid:

## L1: Answer (1 line)
[SESSION] marker + current phase + satisfaction score + progress fraction.
Example: [SESSION] Pipeline: shape → loop | Collaborative | Strategic | Zone: 2 | satisfaction: 82 | 7/12 items

## L2: Grouped Reasons (5-10 lines)
- Key decisions made and WHY (not what)
- Approaches eliminated and what they ruled out
- Current blockers or carry items with failure context
- Tensions resolved and how

## L3: Evidence + Unknowns (15-30 lines)
- OBJECTIVE (1 line)
- criteria[] (guidance set)
- holdout[] with current scores
- mustNot[]
- ACCEPTANCE criteria
- Work items: completed, remaining, carry (with failure context)
- [LEARN] insights accumulated across waves
- Failed approaches with elimination reasons
- Open unknowns or unresolved tensions

Input: $ARGUMENTS
